name: Basic Free Green Salad - Vegetarian Cooking F
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash all leafy greens thoroughly.
2. Dry the greens with a clean towel or paper towels.
3. Shred the cabbage and kale if using them as optional ingredients.
4. Slice the radishes, cucumber, and celery into desired sizes.
5. Place all shredded and sliced greens in a large salad bowl.
6. Add any optional ingredients from the list (e.g., onions, tomatoes, sprouts) to the salad.
7. Toss the salad gently until well combined.
8. Serve immediately or refrigerate for later use.
